arabic: يَتَمَحْوَرُ مَفْهُومُ الأُمَّةِ الإِسْلَامِيَّةِ حَوْلَ وَحْدَةِ الإِيمَانِ وَالانْتِمَاءِ الرُّوحِيِّ المُشْتَرَكِ الَّذِي يَتَجَاوَزُ الحُدُودَ الجُغْرَافِيَّةِ وَالِانْتِمَاءَاتِ الِاثْنِيَّةَ.
translation: Koncept islamske zajednice - umme - zasniva se na jedinstvu vjere i zajedničkom duhovnom identitetu koji transcendira geografske granice i etničke identitete.
translationEn: The concept of the Islamic Umma revolves around the unity of faith and a shared spiritual belonging that transcends geographical borders and ethnic affiliations.
